name: Tuscan Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
TIME DOES NOT INCLUDE COOLING AND REFRIGERATION.
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat the ricotta cheese with a blender until smooth. Add eggs, sugar, and milk. Blend until well-mixed and smooth. Add orange and lemon zest and Grand Mariner. Mix well.
3. Grease one cheesecake pan with butter and coat lightly with bread crumbs. Fill the pan three-fourths full with cheesecake mixture. Set the pan in a larger pan filled half-full with water and bake for 1-1/4 hours.
4. Turn off the oven, leaving the cake inside. Let stand for one hour. Remove, let cool, and refrigerate. This moist, light, and fluffy cheesecake is truly "la dolce vita".
